name: Moo Shu Vegetables with Chinese Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh ginger, peeled and grated
6 frozen Chinese pancakes (or whole wheat crepe), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Wrap the pancakes in foil and place them in the oven to warm for about 8 minutes.
3. Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
4. Add green onions, bok choy, red bell pepper, carrots, and mushrooms. Stir-fry vegetables for 3 to 4 minutes until crisp tender.
5. Add sprouts, tofu, ginger, and garlic. Continue cooking for an additional 2 to 3 minutes until sprouts are soft.
6. Stir in tamari and extra Hoisin sauce.
7. To serve, drizzle a spoonful of Hoisin sauce across the center of the pancake.
8. Top with a generous helping of vegetables and roll up burrito style.
